task_completion.description: The agent switches the view to the Sagittal plane.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The main viewer pane shows a side profile of the brain (sagittal view), typically indicated by a yellow border or the 'Sagittal' label in the view controller.

task_completion.description: The agent navigates to the mid-sagittal plane where the cerebellar vermis is clearly visible.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The slice view displays midline structures: the corpus callosum, the brainstem, and the tree-like structure of the cerebellar vermis in the posterior fossa.

task_completion.description: The agent activates the Ruler tool in the Markups module.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Markups module is open in the sidebar, or the mouse cursor is placing a measurement line, or a ruler line is visible on the image.

task_completion.description: The measurement line is correctly placed to measure the AP diameter of the vermis.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A measurement line is drawn spanning from the posterior aspect of the 4th ventricle (fluid space behind brainstem) to the posterior surface of the vermis (widest point).

task_completion.description: The measurement value (in mm) is generated and visible.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A numeric value (e.g., '24.5 mm') is displayed next to the ruler line on the image or within the Markups module table.

task_completion.description: The agent saves the measurement markup to the specified file path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save' dialog or file browser window is visible showing the filename 'vermis_measurement.mrk.json' being saved to '~/Documents/SlicerData/BraTS/'.

task_completion.description: The agent creates a JSON report containing the diameter, morphology, and classification.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal output is visible showing a JSON object with keys 'ap_diameter', 'morphology', and 'classification' populated with values derived from the measurement.

integrity.description: The agent uses the Slicer GUI tools (Markups module) rather than purely programmatic methods.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the Slicer toolbar, Markups module panel, or mouse interaction on the slice view.

integrity.description: The agent performs the measurement on the image before generating the final report.
integrity.visual_evidence: The report file is not created or edited until after the measurement line and value are visible in the Slicer interface.

integrity.description: The agent does not copy-paste values from the task description or external sources.
integrity.visual_evidence: The reported 'ap_diameter' matches the value shown on the ruler in the Slicer screenshot.
